name: Library & API Reference
description: Teaches how to correctly use a library, CLI, or SDK. Includes gotchas, code snippets, and edge cases.

name: Product Verification
description: Tests and verifies product behavior end-to-end. Covers E2E pipelines, QA scripts, and integration testing.

name: Data Fetching & Analysis
description: Connects to data sources, fetches metrics, and performs monitoring or analysis. Includes sync and reporting tools.

name: Business Process & Team Automation
description: Automates repetitive workflows, session management, and team coordination. Reduces manual overhead for recurring tasks.

name: Code Scaffolding & Templates
description: Generates boilerplate code, project structure, or starter templates. Covers project initialization and migration scaffolding.

name: Code Quality & Review
description: Reviews code for quality, detects bugs, enforces conventions, and runs linters or type checks.

name: CI/CD & Deployment
description: Manages build, deploy, and release pipelines. Covers preview deploys, production rollout, and environment management.

name: Runbooks
description: Guides symptom-based investigation with structured diagnosis steps. Follows symptom → investigate → report pattern.

name: Infrastructure Operations
description: Manages infrastructure configuration, environment sync, and operational maintenance tasks.

name: Requirements & Planning
description: Manages requirements gathering, PRD creation, PDCA planning, and feature scoping. Covers interview workflows and execution planning.

name: Documentation & Governance
description: Manages documentation lifecycle, versioning, governance standards, and retrospectives. Ensures project documentation consistency.
